name: leadgen_search
description: Search for potential clients, job opportunities, and professional connections across multiple platforms
description_for_agent: Use this skill to search for potential clients, job listings, or professional connections. Specify the search type (clients, jobs, connections), query terms, and optional filters. Results are saved to the lead generation database automatically.

search_type.description: Type of search: clients, jobs, or connections

query.description: Search query — keywords, company names, job titles, industries, etc.

job_type.description: Job type filter: full-time, part-time, contract, freelance

remote.description: Remote work filter: any, remote, hybrid, onsite

save_results.description: Whether to save search results to the database (default: true)
